
Index Fits {data-navmenu="Data Fits"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Index Fits by Fleet

```{r idx_facet}
mv_plot_obs_pred_facet(
  df    = mv$index_fits,
  facet = "fleet",
  ylab  = "Index"
)
```

### Index Residuals

```{r idx_resid}
idx_r <- mv$index_fits[
  !is.na(mv$index_fits$residual), , drop = FALSE
]
if (nrow(idx_r) > 0) {
  mv_plot_bubble(
    df     = idx_r,
    x_col  = "year",
    y_col  = "fleet",
    xlab   = "Year",
    ylab   = "Fleet",
    title  = "Index Residuals"
  )
}
```

### Index Residual Diagnostics

```{r idx_resid_panel}
if (nrow(idx_r) > 0) {
  mv_plot_resid_panel(
    df    = idx_r,
    title = "Index Residual Diagnostics"
  )
}
```
